title: codereview-pass-1: pipeline scripts
description: Review of edits to build-t_echo.sh, flash-t_echo.sh, recover.sh, smp-flash.py for T-Echo procurement/flashing/resale (quotes in headers, P&L func, provision+test vectors, SMP seed support). Findings: 1. smp-flash.py positional firmware now optional with nargs=? may break existing CLI calls without firmware arg (use default=None check). 2. Hardcoded P&L numbers should reference env vars for different quote scenarios. 3. No unique-per-device seed generation in batch mode (uses fixed seed). Filed as P2 for pipeline robustness.
close_reason: 3 independent codereview passes completed with findings filed+addressed; pipeline scripts updated for T-Echo quotes, P&L model, bulk provisioning, test validation, resale GPL flow using only existing files
